description_long: This is a medium-sized, slightly misshapen orange pumpkin with a rough, matte surface and visible natural blemishes. The pumpkin features a short, brownish-green stem at the top, which is slightly curved and textured. On one side, a traditional jack-o'-lantern face is carved, displaying triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged mouth, all cut through to reveal the hollow interior. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is uncarved, showing natural dimples and color variations typical of a real pumpkin. The overall form is somewhat flattened and irregular, giving it a realistic, organic appearance. No additional decorative accessories are present.
description: A rough, orange pumpkin with a carved jack-o'-lantern face and a short, curved stem. The surface is matte and naturally blemished, with one side featuring traditional facial cutouts.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown from the back, highlighting its rough, orange surface and the short, brownish-green stem, with no visible carvings.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the pumpkin, featuring a traditional jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, nose, and a jagged mouth cut into the surface.
description_view_2: The pumpkin is seen from the opposite side of the face, showing only the uncarved, textured orange surface and the stem.
description_view_3: A side view of the pumpkin, emphasizing its irregular, organic shape and the matte, orange skin with some blemishes; the stem is visible but no carvings are present.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged, toothy mouth cut out of the pumpkin's surface. The style is classic and geometric, with no additional motifs or etchings.
